title: Rect Layout Feature
description: Scans the surface of a Chunk, calling place() on the surface of each block column with rectangular layout.

rect_layout_definition.title: Rect Layout Definition
rect_layout_definition.description: A single Rect Layout Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

ratio_of_empty_space.description: Optional. The ratio of empty space within feature areas.

feature_areas.description: Optional. Array of feature areas with dimensions.

feature.description: Reference to the feature to place in this area.

area_dimensions.description: Dimensions [width, height] of the feature area.
